title: Belaco Electric 3 Bar Halogen Heater 1200W, Portable Room Heater with 3 Heat Settings, 90° Oscillation, Tip Over Safety Switch, Compact Carry Handle, Black
features: Tailored heat control — 3 output levels 400W / 800W / 1200W let you choose quick bursts of warmth or steady everyday heating for home.
Efficient radiant heating — halogen room heater design delivers instant radiant warmth; a low energy heater option to help lower running costs indoors.
Wider coverage with oscillation — 90° rotating heat output spreads warmth across the room, suited to bedrooms, lounges, home offices, and conservatories.
Portable, compact build — lightweight portable electric heater with carry handle; easy to move, store, and position where heat is needed most.
Safety built in — tip over safety switch plus overheat protection for safer, practical heating in family homes.
Quiet comfort — slim, small heater operates almost silently, ideal for work, study, reading, or night time use without distraction.
Space saving design — modern compact heater fits neatly into smaller rooms; a practical indoor heater when space is limited.
Power, plug and guarantee — runs on 220–240V, 50Hz with 1200W max output; supplied with CE certified & UKCA UK 3 pin plug and 1 year manufacturer’s guarantee.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Adjustable Temperature, Energy Efficient, Fast Heating, Noiseless, Oscillating
